raw.title: Limiting Not Just Screen Time, But Screen Space
raw.excerpt: The post Limiting Not Just Screen Time, But Screen Space appeared first on NOEMA.

llm_processed.summary: The author reflects on the encroachment of digital technology into private spaces, suggesting a rethinking of how we integrate technology with ecological and personal boundaries.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Bridges to digital detox movements and intentional community design.
